diagnosis: Promo Place already has a website, but it likely undersells the real business. The redesign opportunity is to improve clarity, trust, and the path from interest to booking or enquiry. Make the current site feel more credible than the existing version. Make the offer easier to understand at a glance. The biggest leak is usually unclear positioning and a weak next step.
siteBrief: Promo Place is a Restaurant in Test City. Lead with Promo Place already has real-world traction; the website should finally feel as strong as the service. Highlight Signature offer, Private bookings, Visit information. Keep the tone confident, refined, locally credible. The main CTA should be Get in touch. One design choice that should stand out is editorial photography.
coldMessage: Hey Promo, I looked at Promo Place in Test City. Maps scraper website status: independent_http_site. I took a look at the current site and mocked up a version that makes the offer clearer and the next step easier for mobile visitors. Happy to send the mockup if you want to see it.
followUps: Quick follow-up: the clearest gap I noticed is hero clarity. I can send over the mockup if it would help.
One more thought: nearby competitors usually do a better job showing CTA path. I already mocked up a tighter version if you want to compare it.
subjectLines: Saw your listing and made this for Promo Place
